_note: The CDE is the agreed source of information for the project, used to collect, manage and disseminate information. Information containers flow through 4 states.

WIP.name: Work in Progress
WIP.description: Pre-shared workspace; each task team has its own WIP area

Shared.name: Shared
Shared.description: Reviewed and approved within task team; shared with other task teams for coordination/review

Published.name: Published
Published.description: Authorized for use by all project parties for the intended purpose
Published.approval_required: Lead appointed party / Information Manager authorization

WIP_to_Shared.trigger: Task team internal check + suitability status assigned (S1/S2/S3)

Shared_to_Shared.trigger: Status increment (e.g., S1→S3) after review/comment cycle

Shared_to_Published.trigger: Status reaches S7 (Suitable for use) + lead appointed party authorization

engine_lookup._purpose: Flat key/value form for runtime engine consumption
